tasks.label: Inspect App files and HPCAN site
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Write-Host '--- App.tsx (hero excerpt) ---'; Get-Content -Path 'src/App.tsx' -TotalCount 120; Write-Host '--- App.css (hero excerpt) ---'; Get-Content -Path 'src/App.css' -TotalCount 220; Write-Host '--- hpcan.org head excerpt ---'; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://hpcan.org/' -UseBasicParsing; $html=$r.Content; $title=[regex]::Match($html,'<title>(.*?)</title>','IgnoreCase').Groups[1].Value; Write-Host ('Title: ' + $title); $matches=[regex]::Matches($html,'#(?:[0-9a-fA-F]{3}){1,2}'); ($matches | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object {$_.Value}) -join ', ' | Write-Host; $logo=[regex]::Matches($html,'https?://[^"\']+\.(?:png|svg|jpg|jpeg)','IgnoreCase') | Select-Object -First 5; Write-Host 'Image URLs:'; $logo | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_.Value } } catch { Write-Host $_.Exception.Message }

tasks.label: Fetch HPCAN brand cues
tasks.command: $r = Invoke-WebRequest https://hpcan.org/; $html = $r.Content; Write-Output (([regex]::Match($html,'<title>(.*?)</title>','IgnoreCase')).Groups[1].Value); [regex]::Matches($html,'https?://[^"'' ]+\.(png|svg|jpg|jpeg)','IgnoreCase') | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }; [regex]::Matches($html,'#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}') | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }

tasks.label: Search logo keyword in hpcan html
tasks.command: $html=(Invoke-WebRequest https://hpcan.org/).Content; Select-String -InputObject $html -Pattern 'logo|HPCAN|Community Action Network|assets/images' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value } | Select-Object -Unique | Select-Object -First 40

tasks.label: Apply HPCAN brand styling update
Refine HPCAN JSX block
tasks.command:
$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $app='src/App.tsx'; $text=Get-Content -Raw $app; $new=@'
HPCAN Hazel Park Community Action Network
'@; $text=[regex]::Replace($text,'
\s*',$new,1); Set-Content -Path $app -Value $text;

tasks.label: Add HPCAN link styles
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $css='src/App.css'; $text=Get-Content -Raw $css; if($text -notmatch '\.hpcan-name:hover'){ $text += "`n.hpcan-name {`n  text-decoration: none;`n}`n`n.hpcan-name:hover {`n  text-decoration: underline;`n  text-underline-offset: 2px;`n}`n" }; Set-Content -Path $css -Value $text;

tasks.label: Fix HPCAN link styles safely
Check branding snippets
tasks.command: Write-Host '--- App.tsx ---'; Get-Content src/App.tsx -TotalCount 220; Write-Host '--- App.css ---'; Get-Content src/App.css -TotalCount 150; Write-Host '--- App.css tail ---'; Get-Content src/App.css | Select-Object -Last 40

tasks.label: Verify HPCAN lines and build
tasks.command: Write-Host 'App.tsx hpcan lines:'; Select-String -Path src/App.tsx -Pattern 'hpcan-brand|hpcan-badge|hpcan-name|hpcan.org' -SimpleMatch:$false; Write-Host 'App.css hpcan lines:'; Select-String -Path src/App.css -Pattern '\.hpcan-brand|\.hpcan-badge|\.hpcan-name' -SimpleMatch:$false; npm run build

tasks.label: Link HPCAN name to site
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $app='src/App.tsx'; $text=Get-Content -Raw $app; $text=$text -replace 'Hazel Park Community Action Network','Hazel Park Community Action Network'; Set-Content -Path $app -Value $text; npm run build
